title: Training data loaded from unvalidated external source
description: Training or fine-tuning data is loaded from external sources without integrity validation. Poisoned data can embed backdoors into the model.
remediation: Validate data provenance with checksums. Use curated datasets from trusted sources. Implement data quality gates before training.

title: RAG corpus updated without content validation
description: New documents are added to the RAG corpus without content validation or review. An attacker can inject poisoned documents to manipulate query results.
remediation: Implement document review pipeline before ingestion. Validate content quality and check for adversarial patterns.

title: Embedding pipeline without input validation
description: Text is passed to the embedding model without validation. Crafted inputs can manipulate embedding space to produce adversarial nearest-neighbor results.
remediation: Validate and sanitize input text before embedding. Implement length limits and character filtering.

title: Model loaded with pickle deserialization
description: Model weights are loaded using pickle-based deserialization which can execute arbitrary code. Malicious model files can achieve RCE during loading.
remediation: Use safetensors format instead of pickle. If pickle is required, use torch.load(weights_only=True).

title: Pre-trained model without revision pinning
description: A pre-trained model is loaded without pinning to a specific revision hash. The model could be updated with a compromised version.
remediation: Pin models to specific revision hashes: from_pretrained('model', revision='abc123')
